points.text: InflaRx N.V. — vilobelimab — anti-C5a monoclonal antibody — First-in-class intravenously delivered agent selectively binding free C5a with demonstrated disease-modifying clinical activity in multiple studies.
Invivyd Inc. — VMS063 — Measles treatment and prevention — Novel potential first- and best-in-class measles monoclonal antibody candidate advanced under the REVOLUTION program.
Kainova Therapeutics initiated dosing in Europe for DT-7012, a Treg-depleting anti-CCR8 monoclonal antibody, expanding its Phase I/II trial in immuno-oncology.

Hutchmed initiated a registrational Phase III trial of HMPL-760 in combination with R-GemOx (including the monoclonal antibody rituximab) for relapsed/refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma in China, enrolling approximately 240 patients.

New JAMA Pediatrics data indicates hospitalization risk doubles for extremely preterm infants in their second RSV season, challenging current guidelines that do not recommend RSV monoclonal antibodies for this group during the second season.

CDC and AAP guidelines recommend nirsevimab (Beyfortus) or clesrovimab (Enflonsia) monoclonal antibodies for infants under 8 months if maternal vaccination was not administered, and for high-risk children aged 8–19 months during their second season.

Sanofi — Amlitelimab (SAR445229) — Atopic Dermatitis — Fully human, nondepleting anti-OX40L immunoglobulin G4 monoclonal antibody demonstrated durable, progressive skin clearance in Phase 2b STREAM-AD study with maintained improvement through week 52 post-discontinuation.

Sanofi — Amlitelimab — Atopic Dermatitis — Phase 3 COAST-1, COAST-2, and SHORE trials evaluated 500 mg dosing every 4 or 12 weeks in >1,800 adults/adolescents with moderate-to-severe disease, targeting IGA 0/1 at week 24 as primary endpoint.
Biocon launched Bosaya and Aukelso, denosumab biosimilars, in the US market for osteoporosis and bone metastasis indications.

University of Geneva researchers developed a synthetic DNA drug system that references monoclonal antibodies as the current standard for antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) in cancer therapy, noting ADCs' limitations in tumor penetration and drug payload capacity compared to the new smaller DNA-based approach.

Tafasitamab-cxix (Monjuvi), a humanized Fc-modified CD19-targeting monoclonal antibody, demonstrated robust real-world efficacy in relapsed/refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (R/R DLBCL) across a racially diverse US cohort of 181 patients.

Janssen received FDA approval for teclistamab-cqyv (Tecvayli) plus daratumumab and hyaluronidase-fihj (Darzalex Faspro), the first BCMA-targeted bispecific monoclonal antibody combination for relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma after at least one prior line of therapy.

Sanofi's isatuximab-irfc (Sarclisa) combined with carfilzomib, lenalidomide, and dexamethasone (Isa-KRd) significantly improved minimal residual disease (MRD) negativity in transplant-eligible newly diagnosed multiple myeloma patients in a Phase 3 study.
Hybridoma technology remains a standard method for producing monoclonal antibodies by fusing B cells with immortal myeloma cells to create stable cell lines.

InflaRx N.V. — vilobelimab — Anti-C5a monoclonal antibody — First-in-class intravenously delivered agent selectively binding free C5a; demonstrated disease-modifying clinical activity and tolerability in multiple clinical studies.
Invivyd Inc. — VMS063 — Measles — Novel potential first- and best-in-class measles monoclonal antibody candidate advanced under the REVOLUTION program for treatment and prevention.
Kainova Therapeutics — DT-7012 — Advanced Solid Tumors — First patient dosed in Europe for Phase I/II trial of Treg-depleting anti-CCR8 monoclonal antibody.

Hutchmed — HMPL-760 + R-GemOx (rituximab) — Relapsed/Refractory Diffuse Large B-cell Lymphoma — Phase III trial initiated March 20, 2026 in China; randomized, double-blind, positive-controlled study vs placebo + R-GemOx with primary endpoints of PFS and OS.

Sanofi — Amlitelimab — Atopic Dermatitis — Phase 2b STREAM-AD study showed progressive IGA and EASI score improvements without plateau; durable effect observed after drug cessation, prompting Phase 3 investigation.

Sanofi — Amlitelimab — Atopic Dermatitis — Phase 3 COAST-1, COAST-2, and SHORE studies initiated with >1,800 participants; COAST trials assess monotherapy, SHORE combines with topical corticosteroids or calcineurin inhibitors.
Biocon — Bosaya / Aukelso — Osteoporosis and Bone Metastasis — US commercial launch of denosumab biosimilars initiated.

University of Geneva — Synthetic DNA 'smart' drug — Cancer — New programmable system uses short DNA strands to overcome monoclonal antibody limitations in ADCs by enabling deeper tumor penetration and multi-drug delivery upon detection of dual tumor markers.

Ingenus / MorphoSys — Tafasitamab (Monjuvi) — Relapsed/Refractory Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma — Real-world chart review of 181 patients confirmed efficacy in community settings; 72% treated in second-line, median age 71.1 years, with 22% Black and 17% Hispanic/Latino representation.

Janssen — Teclistamab + Daratumumab — Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma — FDA approved first BCMA-targeted bispecific monoclonal antibody combination for patients with ≥1 prior line of therapy; based on Phase 3 MajesTEC-3 trial data.

Sanofi — Isatuximab (Sarclisa) — Newly Diagnosed Multiple Myeloma — Phase 3 trial: Isa-KRd regimen achieved 77% MRD negativity at 10⁻⁵ sensitivity vs 67% for KRd alone (OR 1.67, p=0.049); 68% vs 48% at 10⁻⁶ sensitivity (OR 2.36, p=0.0004).

InflaRx N.V. — Complement system targeting — vilobelimab (anti-C5a monoclonal antibody) + izicopan (C5aR inhibitor) — vilobelimab demonstrated disease-modifying activity; izicopan in Phase 1/2a for hidradenitis suppurativa.
Invivyd Inc. — Measles monoclonal antibody development — VMS063 — Novel potential first- and best-in-class candidate advanced under REVOLUTION program for treatment and prevention.

Kainova Therapeutics — Advancing immuno-oncology pipeline — DT-7012 (anti-CCR8 mAb) + DT-9081 (EP4 antagonist) — Phase I/II trial expansion in Europe; Phase I EPRAD study for DT-9081 met primary objectives with favorable safety.

Hutchmed — Advancing BTK inhibitor pipeline in combination with monoclonal antibody rituximab — HMPL-760 — Phase III registrational trial launched for DLBCL in China with 240-patient enrollment target.

AstraZeneca / Merck — RSV monoclonal antibody commercialization and guideline adherence — Nirsevimab (Beyfortus) / Clesrovimab (Enflonsia) — Current recommendations limit second-season use to high-risk children aged 8–19 months, excluding most preterm infants.

Sanofi — Advancing anti-OX40L monoclonal antibody pipeline — Amlitelimab (SAR445229) — Phase 3 trials (COAST-1, COAST-2, SHORE) ongoing for moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis; Phase 2b data supports durable efficacy post-treatment.
Biocon — Biosimilar commercialization in US market — Bosaya (denosumab) + Aukelso (denosumab) — US launch executed April 2026.

Ingenus / MorphoSys — Commercialization of humanized Fc-modified CD19-targeting monoclonal antibody — Tafasitamab (Monjuvi) — Accelerated approval secured in 2020 for combination with lenalidomide; real-world data validates performance in non-trial populations with high disease burden (93% stage III/IV).

Janssen — Commercialization of bispecific monoclonal antibody combinations — Teclistamab (Tecvayli) + Daratumumab (Darzalex Faspro) — FDA approval granted March 2026 for R/R multiple myeloma; positioned as first-in-class BCMA-targeted bispecific mAb combo.
Sanofi — Upfront treatment optimization in multiple myeloma — Isatuximab (Sarclisa) — Phase 3 data supports Isa-KRd regimen for transplant-eligible NDMM; 4-year PFS rate of 80% observed across arms.

vilobelimab — Mechanism: Anti-C5a monoclonal antibody selectively binding free C5a — Phase: Multiple clinical studies completed — Population: Inflammatory disease patients — Results: Demonstrated disease-modifying clinical activity and tolerability.

VMS063 — Mechanism: Measles monoclonal antibody — Phase: Preclinical/Early clinical (REVOLUTION program) — Population: Measles treatment and prevention — Status: Novel potential first- and best-in-class candidate.
DT-7012 — Mechanism: Treg-depleting anti-CCR8 monoclonal antibody — Phase: I/II — Population: Advanced solid tumors — Status: First patient dosed in Europe; trial expansion ongoing.

HMPL-760 — Mechanism: Non-covalent, third-generation BTK inhibitor (wild-type and C481S-mutated) — Phase: 3 — Population: Relapsed/refractory DLBCL patients ineligible for transplant — Comparator: Placebo + R-GemOx — Endpoints: Investigator-assessed PFS and OS.

Nirsevimab / Clesrovimab — Mechanism: Long-acting RSV F-protein monoclonal antibodies — Phase: Post-marketing surveillance — Population: Extremely preterm infants in second RSV season — Comparator: None (observational) — Results: Hospitalization risk doubles in second season despite lack of current second-season monoclonal antibody recommendations for this group.

Amlitelimab — Mechanism: Anti-OX40L immunoglobulin G4 monoclonal antibody inhibiting T-cell-dependent pathogenic inflammation — Phase: 3 (COAST-1, COAST-2, SHORE) — Population: Adults and adolescents (avg age 30, 20% adolescents) with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis — Comparator: Placebo — Endpoints: Proportion achieving IGA 0/1 at week 24; secondary endpoints include EASI scores.

Bosaya / Aukelso — Mechanism: Denosumab (RANKL inhibitor monoclonal antibody biosimilar) — Phase: Commercial — Population: Osteoporosis and bone metastasis patients — Comparator: Reference product — Status: US market launch.

Synthetic DNA drug system — Mechanism: Two-key activation via dual tumor marker detection to assemble drug-carrying DNA structures — Phase: Preclinical research — Population: Cancer cells — Comparator: Monoclonal antibody-based ADCs — Results: DNA strands are smaller than antibodies allowing better tumor tissue penetration and capacity for multiple drug components.

Tafasitamab — Mechanism: Humanized Fc-modified CD19-targeting monoclonal antibody — Phase: Real-world evidence (post-Phase 2 L-MIND) — Population: R/R DLBCL patients ineligible for autologous stem-cell transplant (median age 71.1, 47.5% ECOG ≥2) — Comparator: Historical L-MIND trial data (60% ORR in predominantly White academic cohort) — Results: Confirmed robust responses in diverse community settings with earlier-line use as key determinant of improved outcomes.

Teclistamab + Daratumumab — Mechanism: BCMA-targeted bispecific monoclonal antibody + CD38-targeted monoclonal antibody — Phase: 3 (MajesTEC-3) — Population: Relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma (≥1 prior line) — Comparator: Standard of care (implied) — Results: Described as 'best efficacy data' in R/R setting; first approved bispecific mAb combo for this indication.

Isatuximab — Mechanism: Anti-CD38 monoclonal antibody — Phase: 3 — Population: Transplant-eligible newly diagnosed multiple myeloma — Comparator: Carfilzomib, lenalidomide, dexamethasone (KRd) — Results: 77% MRD negativity (10⁻⁵) vs 67% (OR 1.67, p=0.049); 68% (10⁻⁶) vs 48% (OR 2.36, p=0.0004); 4-year PFS 80%.

Monoclonal Antibodies — Mechanism: Fused B-cell and myeloma cell lines — Phase: Preclinical/Production — Population: Research/Therapeutic targets — Comparator: None specified — Endpoints: Stable, continuous production of high-affinity, target-specific antibodies.
Biocon — US market expansion — Bosaya and Aukelso denosumab biosimilars — Commercial launch completed April 2026.
